sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thungetna hunpha hi-a, lungsim i niamkhiat ciang,
I lawm le Honpa Jesuh kiang i kikhop
Amah umin va zuan leng, Amah’n ei hong hupah,
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna zatui

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thungetna hun nuam, Hun nuam thungetna;
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thungetna hunpha hi-a, Honpa A hong nai ciang,
I haksatnate khempeuh, I va puak ciang inah,
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Thungetna hunpha hi-a, ze-etna i thuak ciang,
Amah in hong khasiat in, i dahna paikhia pah,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Thungetna hunpha hi-a, i up takpi nak leh,
Tua thuphate hanginah, lungkhamna teng beipah,
